name: CheckSmart
description_short: Newport, KY's CheckSmart location at 1851 Monmouth St offers fast check cashing and short-term loans for quick cash needs.
description_long:
CheckSmart at 1851 Monmouth St in Newport, KY is a standalone check-cashing store serving the Newport area with convenient hours. Located on Monmouth Street, this Newport location welcomes customers Monday through Saturday, with extended weekday hours (9AM-7PM Mon-Thu, 8AM-7PM Friday) and shorter Saturday hours (9AM-4PM). The store is closed on Sundays.

This Newport CheckSmart location specializes in check cashing for personal and business checks, as well as short-term financial solutions. Call 859-581-8400 to ask about check-cashing fees, lending options, or other services available at this specific Newport, KY location.

If you live or work in Newport and need quick cash, bring a valid ID and your check to this Monmouth St location. CheckSmart provides fast, no-credit-needed cash advances and check-cashing services for Newport residents.
pros: Extended hours including Friday 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM at the Columbus Morse Road location for convenience
Online appointment scheduling available to reduce wait times and streamline the in-store process
Multiple financial services under one roof: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, and debit card issuance
Nine Ohio locations across Columbus, Heath, Marion, Marysville, Reynoldsville, Springfield, and Whitehall for geographic accessibility
Gift card exchange service available in-store for immediate cash conversion
Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance available in-store, expanding beyond traditional check cashing
Clear documentation requirements listed upfront to help customers prepare for faster application processing
cons: Acts as a broker to third-party lenders rather than a direct lender, creating a middleman layer that may affect loan terms and transparency
No specific information provided about loan rates, APRs, or terms—customers must visit in-store or call to learn cost details
Limited hours on Sunday (11:00 AM - 5:00 PM) and Saturday (9:00 AM - 4:00 PM) compared to weekday availability
Check cashing and ancillary financial services typically carry fees that are not disclosed on the website
No online application process mentioned; applicants must visit a physical store or contact by phone to proceed
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing, money transfer, or bill payment services
Ohio residents without traditional bank accounts seeking accessible financial services and lending access
Customers preferring in-person interaction and guidance through the lending application process
People in underserved areas of Ohio needing multiple financial services at a single location
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best for unbanked or underbanked Ohio residents needing check cashing, money transfer, or bill pay services, with the added convenience of accessing third-party lending products in-store. The main caveat is that CheckSmart functions as a broker to unaffiliated lenders rather than a direct lender, meaning loan terms, rates, and approval criteria depend on partner lenders, not CheckSmart itself—and specific loan product details are not disclosed online.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
Third-party lending product access and applications
In-store loan applications with lending decisions
In-store customer service and financial guidance
meta_description: CheckSmart at 1851 Monmouth St, Newport, KY. Fast check cashing and short-term loans available.
